title: SwordSabers
description: Changes iron, diamond, and netherite swords into legendary 3D LIGHTSABERS!
body:
This resource pack changes swords into 3D lightsabers, not just flat textures.
you do not need optifine or anything like that, so you can enjoy lightsabers in your vanilla game!
these lightsabers don't glow yet, but if you enchant them, the glint makes them look really cool!

I plan on adding more features such as more lightsabers if you use optifine.

enjoy!
don't forget to follow!

ISSUES: the gold lightsaber isn't a lightsaber, will be fixed in 1.1
